scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,bot -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:bot"
scripts.build: npm --prefix apps/api run build && npm --prefix apps/bot run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix apps/api run lint && npm --prefix apps/bot run lint
scripts.test: npm --prefix apps/api test && npm --prefix apps/bot test
scripts.test:coverage: npm --prefix apps/api run test:coverage && npm --prefix apps/bot run test:coverage
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm test && npm run build
scripts.check:integration: npm run db:start && npm run db:migrate && npm run test:integration
